meaning: n.尖锐,(疾病的)剧烈,(视力、才智等的)敏锐
examples: We work on improving visual acuity.
We will then have an objective measure of how colour discrimination and visual acuity develop at the level of the brain.
Common symptoms include reduced visual acuity, visual distortion (metamorphosia, macropsia and micropsia).
It requires a combination of acuity with physics, topography and touch that's rare in sports.
The simplicity of his language, the disarming lyricism, and acuity of perception define his greatness.
